SEARCH

Package cpdt.backend.mqtt

package cpdt.backend.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for the Digital Twin backend.

This package contains components responsible for receiving telemetry from the simulator and publishing backend-generated messages through the MQTT broker. These classes form the communication layer between the simulator and the backend application.

The package integrates Spring's messaging infrastructure with the Eclipse Paho MQTT client to support reliable bidirectional messaging.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    cpdt.backend
    Implements the backend module of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    DeviceStatusPublisher
    Publishes device status updates to the MQTT broker.
    TelemetryMessageHandler
    Handles telemetry messages received from the MQTT broker.
